summary: Single Team subscriber YouTube archive unsubscribed team - Game Tile
description:
GIVEN a user is a Single Team subscriber
AND an archive YouTube game does not contain the subscribed team

steps.action: WHEN a user views/focuses an archive YouTube game tile
steps.result:
THEN a lock icon displays in the upper right corner of the game tile
AND there is a dark overlay over the team colors in the game tile header
AND the YouTube pill does not display in the game tile
